<L>2991<pc>0126-c<k1>aBi<k2>aBi
{#aBi#}¦ {%<ab>ind.</ab>%} {@1@} (As a prefix to
verbs and nouns) It means ({%a%})
‘to’, ‘towards’, ‘in the direction of’;
{#aBigam#} go towards, {#aBiyA, ˚gamanaM#},
{#˚yAnaM#} &c.; ({%b%}) ‘for’, ‘against’;
{#˚laz, ˚pat#} &c.; ({%c%}) ‘on’, ‘upon’;
{#˚siMc#} to sprinkle on &c.; ({%d%}),
‘over’, ‘above’, ‘across’; {#˚BU#} to <lbinfo n="over+power"/>
overpower, {#˚tan#}; ({%e%}) ‘greatly’; <lbinfo n="‘exces+sively"/>
‘excessively’ {#˚kaMp#}. {@--2@} (As a prefix to nouns
not derived from verbs, and to <lbinfo n="ad+jectives"/>
adjectives) It expresses ({%a%}) <lbinfo n="inten+sity"/>
intensity or superiority; {#˚DarmaH#} ‘supreme
duty’; {#˚tAmra#} ‘very red, {#˚nava#} ‘very
new’; ({%b%}) ‘towards,’ ‘in the <lbinfo n="direc+tion"/>
direction of,’ forming <ab>adv.</ab> compounds;
{#˚cEdyaM, ˚muKaM, ˚dUti#} &c. {@--3@} (As a
separable adverb) It means <lbinfo n="to+wards"/>
towards, in the direction or <lbinfo n="vicini+ty"/>
vicinity of (<ab>opp.</ab> {#apa#}); in, above, aloft,
on the top, (mostly Ved). {@--4@} (As a
preposition with <ab>acc.</ab>) ({%a%}) To, <lbinfo n="to+wards"/>
towards, in the direction of, against;
(with <ab>acc.</ab> or in <ab>comp.</ab> in this
sense); {#aByAgni#} or {#agnimaBi SalaBAH#}
{#pataMti; vfkzamaBi dyotate vidyut#} <ls>Sk.</ls>;  <lbinfo n="ls:Śi.+ 9. 56"/>
<ls>Śi. 9. 56</ls>, <ls n="Śi.">7. 40</ls>; {#aByarkabiMbaM sTitaH#} <ls>Ś. 7. 11.</ls>
({%b%}) Near, before, in front or
presence of; <ls>Śi. 7. 32</ls>; <ls n="Śi.">15. 58.</ls>
({%c%}) On, upon, with regard or <lbinfo n="re+ference"/>
reference to; {#sAyamaMqanamaBi tvarayaMtyaH#}  <lbinfo n="ls:Ki.+ 9. 6"/>
<ls>Ki. 9. 6</ls>; {#sADurdevadatto mAtaramaBi#} <ls>Sk.</ls> ({%d%})
Severally, one after another (in a
distributive sense); {#vfkzaM vfkzamaBi#} <lbinfo n="siM#cati"/>
{#siMcati#} <ls>Sk.</ls>; {#BUtaBUtamaBi praBuH#} <ls>Bop.</ls> By <lbinfo n="ls:P.+I"/>
[Page0127-a+ 57]
<ls>P. I. 4. 91</ls> {#aBi#} has all the senses of
{#anu#} given in <ls n="P.">I. 4. 90</ls> except that of
{#BAga#}; {%<ab>e. g.</ab>%} ({#lakzaRe#}) {#harimaBi vartate#}; ( <lbinfo n="itTaM#BUtAKyAne"/>
{#itTaMBUtAKyAne#}) {#Bakto harimaBi#}; ({#vIpsAyAM#}), {#devaM#}
{#devamaBi siMcati#}; but {#yadatra mamABizyAt taddIyatAM#};
{#prAjYo goviMdamaBitizWati#} <ls>Bop.</ls> ({%e%}) In, into,
to; <ls>Śi. 8. 60.</ls> ({%f%}) For, for the sake
of, on account of (<ab>Ved.</ab>). According
to <ls>G. M.</ls> {#aBi#} has these senses:  <lbinfo n="--a#Bi"/>
{#--aBi#}, <lbinfo n="pUjABfSArTecCAsOmyABimuKyasOrUpyavacanAhA#rasvADyAyezu"/>
{#pUjABfSArTecCAsOmyABimuKyasOrUpyavacanAhArasvADyAyezu#}; {%<ab>e. g.</ab>%} {#pUjAyAM, aBivaMdate; BfSe#},
{#aBiniveSaH; icCAyAM, aBilAzaH, aBikaH#};
{#sOmye#} or {#mADurye, aBijAtaH; ABimuKye#}, <lbinfo n="aBi#muKaM"/>
{#aBimuKaM, aByagni; sOrUpye, aBirUpaM; vacane#}, <lbinfo n="a#BiDatte"/>
{#aBiDatte; AhAre, aByavaharati; svADyAye#}, <lbinfo n="aBya#syAti"/>
{#aByasyAti#}. [<ab>cf.</ab> <ab>L.</ab> {%ob%}; <ab>Gr.</ab> {%amphi%}; Zend
{%aibi%} or {%aiwi%}, <ab>Goth.</ab> {%bi%}; also {%umbi%}; {%um%}].
<LEND>

<L>765<pc>0082<k1>aBi<k2>aBi/
{@abhí,@} (abhī́),¦ in seiner Bedeutung möglichst genau dem <lang>lat.</lang> ob (von dem das oskische op ganz zu trennen ist) entsprechend. Die Grundbedeutung ist zu jemand hin, Gesicht gegen Gesicht gekehrt [ābhimukhyam <ls>Nir. 〔1,3〕</ls>], also auf die Vorderseite eines Gegenstandes zu, daher weiter: auf einen Gegenstand zu, um ihn zu erlangen, zu benutzen. Endlich drückt es eine noch über den Gegenstand hinausgehende Bewegung aus: darüber hinaus, überragend, übertreffend. So erscheint es als:
<div n="P">Erstes Glied einer Zusammensetzung in den nächstfolgenden Worten.
<div n="P">Richtungswort, gefügt zu den Verben: aj, añj, am, ar, arṣ, av, <hom>1.</hom> as, i, idh, iyakṣ, īkṣ, ud, <hom>2.</hom> ūh, ṛñj, kāś, krand, kram, kṣad, kṣam, kṣar, ksip, khyā, gam, <hom>1.</hom> <hom>2.</hom> gā, gāh, gur, <hom>1.</hom> gir, ghrā, cakṣ, car, jan, juṣ, taṃs, <hom>1.</hom> tan, tar, tṛd, tsár, dabh, dah, dās, <hom>2.</hom> dī, drā, dru, druh, dhanv, dham, <hom>1.</hom> dhā, dhāv, dhī, nakṣ, <hom>2.</hom> naś, nī, <hom>1.</hom> <hom>2.</hom> nu, pad, <hom>1.</hom> pā, pi, piś, pū, prath, pru, pruṣ, bādh, bhañj, bhā, bhū, bhṛ, mad, <hom>1.</hom> man, mantray, mand, (mur), mṛdh, mṛś, mlā, yaj, (yam), yas, yā, yuj, yudh, rakṣ, (rabh), ruh, lī, vaj, van, valg, vaś, <hom>2.</hom> vas, vah, <hom>1.</hom> vā, vāś, vij, vivās, vī, <hom>1.</hom> vṛ, vṛt, vṛdh, vṛṣ, vyā, vraj, vlag, śaṃs, śās, śuc, śubh, śnath, <hom>1.</hom> śru, śvas, sac, sad, san, sap, sah, sṛj, stan, stu, sthā, spaś, sru, svar, han, hary, hvṛ.
<div n="P"><ab>Präp.</ab> <ab n="mit">m.</ab> <ab>Acc.</ab> 1〉 {%zu — hin%} 〰 mitrám {534,10}; 〰 náras {363,7}; 〰 nas {264,11}; {327,3} (durch su getrennt). _{327,4}; 〰 viśas {521,2}; 〰 mā́nuṣān {48,7}; 〰 vatsám {725,7}; śaktím 〰 {230,7}; 〰 vásyas {31,18}; 〰 sumnám {871,9}; 〰 jīvalokám {844,8}; 〰 práyas {45,8}; {119,1}; {134,1}; {626,42}; {652,29}; {683,14}; {702,24}; 〰 práyāṃsi {457,44}; {819,25}; 〰 śū́lam {162,11}; 〰 dhā́ma {121,6}; sadhástham 〰 {733,3}; 〰 priyátame sadhásthe {843,6}; 〰 kṣā́m {459,13}; {534,16}; 〰 dróṇāni {715,1}; {745,2}; drúṇā {810,2}; sāśanānaśané 〰 {916,4}; 〰 śukrā́m upastíram {774,28}. 2〉 {%zu = um zu erlangen%} 〰 śrávas {61,10}; krátum 〰 {450,5}; 〰 saúbhagā {774,1}; 〰 víśvāni kā́viā {775,25}; gā́s 〰 {784,3}; 〰 gā́s {809,39}; 〰 dyū́n {33,11}; {190,4}. 3〉 {%über — hinaus,%} überragend, übertreffend 〰 dyā́m {945,8}; bhū́ma 〰 {477,5}; carṣaṇī́s 〰 {86,5}; {303,4}; {377,1}; {440,2}; {531,2}; kṣitī́s {248,4}; páñca bhū́ma {585,2}; víśvā jātā́ {697,4}; bhúvanā 〰 {250,4}; {822,9}; pátnīs 〰 {398,5}; paṇī́n 〰 {675,10}; 〰 śríyas {278,2}. 4〉 {%um — willen:%} vratā́ {892,9}.
<div n="P">In {798,36} ist zu abhí zu ergänzen arṣanti aus dem abhí arṣasi des vorhergehenden Verses; in {33,9} abhavas oder ähnliches.
